_instructions.slide_naming: slide-01.jpg, slide-02.jpg ... (exported from PowerPoint → File → Export → JPEG/PNG)
_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Algorithms & Flowcharts
subtitle: Planning Solutions Before Coding
overview: Students learn how programmers plan solutions using algorithms and flowcharts before writing code. They explore flowchart symbols, create step-by-step algorithms, and design flowcharts for simple programming tasks and web-based processes.

images._note: Add screenshots of flowcharts, algorithm examples, planning activities, and student worksheets.

youtubeVideos.title: Introduction to Algorithms
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn what algorithms are and why they are important.

youtubeVideos.title: Flowcharts Explained
youtubeVideos.desc: Understand common flowchart symbols and their uses.

youtubeVideos.title: Algorithm and Flowchart Basics
youtubeVideos.desc: A beginner-friendly introduction to flowcharts and algorithms.

activity.title: Create a Student Login Flowchart
steps: Discuss the process of logging into a website
Write the steps as an algorithm
Add a process for entering username and password
Create a decision symbol to check credentials
Add a path for valid login
Add a path for invalid login

options: A step-by-step procedure to solve a problem
quiz.explanation: An algorithm is a sequence of steps used to solve a problem.
Algorithms help organize logical steps before writing code.

options: A visual representation of a process
quiz.explanation: Flowcharts visually show the sequence of steps in a process.

quiz.q: Which symbol is used for a decision in a flowchart?

quiz.explanation: A rectangle is used to represent a process or action.

quiz.q: Which symbol is commonly used for Start and End?
quiz.explanation: An oval shape is used for Start and End points.

quiz.q: What connects symbols in a flowchart?
quiz.explanation: Arrows show the flow and direction of the process.

quiz.q: What is the first step in creating a flowchart?
quiz.explanation: Understanding the problem is the first step.
Flowcharts make program logic easier to understand.

quiz.q: Which real-world process can be represented by a flowchart?
quiz.explanation: Flowcharts can represent any step-by-step process.
